title: Old FunFrog
description: The mod for the old FunFrog server
body:
### The mod for the old FunFrog server.

It adds **Tonium** which is 10x harder than Obsidian, **Light Tonium** which is 2x softer than Obsidian, and **Tonium Alloy** which is 16x harder than Obsidian. All Tonium variants are 10x as blast resistant as Obsidian and are fireproof.

**In future this mod was supposed to have:**
- A dungeon in the Nether made out of Cut Tonium and Cut Light Tonium.
